sections.sectionTitle: Mi A Omlaite A Ciahkikna Ding

verses.text: Topa in thu gen a, “Ka mite sisakin, a kikhenthangsak gam ukte in gimna ngah ta hen!” a ci hi

Tua ahih manin ka mipihte a kem gam ukte tawh kisai-in Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hong genin-ah, “Note in ka mite kikhenthang sakin na hawlkhiamang uh a, amaute na don kei uh hi. En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, na gamtatsiate uh hangin gim kong pia ding hi
Ka mite a omlai sunteng, ka hawlkhiatna ding gamte panin ka kaikhawmkik ding a, a gam uhah ka ciahsak kik ding hi. Amaute pungin a khang ding uh hi
Amaute a don ding makaite ka koih ding a, lau nawnlo, lungkham nawnloin khat beek a mangthang nawn kei ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi

“En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, keimah in David' suan lak panin kumpi dingin a diktat mi khat ka khan'khiatsak ni hong tung ding hi. Amah gam uk siam mahmah ding a, gamsungah thuman thutang tawh thu hong khen ding hi
Ama hun hong tun' ciangin Judah mite kihonkhia ding a, Israel mite lungmuang takin a teng ding uh hi. Amah a kilawhna dingin a min, ‘ Topa, Eite' Diktan'na,’ ci-in a kiphuak ding hi
“Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, mite in, ‘Egypt gam panin Israel mite a hong paikhiatpih Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in a kiciam nawn kei ding uh a

‘A hawlkhiatna leilu lam gam leh gamdangte khempeuh panin Israel mite' suanlekhakte kaikhawmin a makaih Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in a kiciamzaw ding uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute amau' gamsung mahah a teng ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Kamsangte tawh kisai-in: Topa' hang leh ama thugen kammal siangthote' hangin keima sungah ka lungsim hong kitamkham a, ka guh ka taang a ling hi. Zu tam ne lua-in a kham mipa tawh ka kibang hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh mun khempeuhah angkawmte a dim hi. Topa' hamsiatna hangin gamsung tengah kahna dim a, gamlak lonona munte a keu mang hi. Amaute gamtatsia uh a, a vangliatna uh a manlopi-in a zang uh hi
Topa in a cihin-ah, “Kamsangte leh siampite in Pasian a zahtak kei uh hi. Ka biakinnsung nangawnah amau' gitlohna ka mu hi

Tua ahih manin amaute' lampi pen khuamial lak lamnal hi ding a, amaute kinawhkhia gawpin a tuk ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute' gimthuak ding hun hong tun' ciangin amaute tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi
Samaria kamsangte sungah a muhthadahhuai mahmah na khat ka mu hi. Baal min suangin thu hilh uh a, ka mi Israel-te lam a pialpih uh hi

Ahih hangin Jerusalem khuasunga om kamsangte' sungah a mulkimhuaizaw na khat ke'n ka mu hi. Angkawmin zuauthu gen uh a, mite a gitlohna uh pan a kikhellohna dingin mi hoihlote a hanthawn zawlai uh hi. A vekpi-un kei' muhna-ah Sodom khuamite tawh kibang khin ka sa a, Gomorrah khuamite tawh zong kilamdanglo uh hi

“Tua ahih manin tua kamsangte tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa in kong genin-ah: En un, keimah in gamsai teh tawh amaute ka vak ding a, gu kisawh tui amaute ka dawnsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jerusalem khua-a om kamsangte' kiang panin gamsung mun khempeuhah Pasian zahtaklohna hong kizel hi,” a ci hi

Vanglian Topa in, “Note kiangah thu hong hilh a, a hong lamen khialsak kamsangte' thugennate na ngai kei un. Amaute in a lungsim uhah a geeltawm uh thu hong gen uh hi a, keima kiang pana hong pai thu ahi kei hi

Keimah Topa' thugennna a hong ngailo mite kiangah, hong hoih na ve, ci-in a gen tawntung uh hi. Amau' lungsim' deihna bang ciat bek a zui tentan mi khempeuhte kiangah zong, gimna hong tung zenzenlo ding hi, ci-in a gen uh hi,” a ci hi
Amaute' lakah kua pen Topa tawh thu kikum khawm ngei a, a thugennate va thei ngei, va za ngei ahi uh hiam? Kua in ama kammal va ngai ngei a, va thupi ngaihsut ngei ahi uh hiam
En un, Topa' hehna huihpi hong nung hi. A hehna huihpi hong kinuai nainai-in hong paikhia ta a, migilopa' lutang hong kiden'na ding hi
A lungsim sunga a tupna teng a tangtun'sak matengin Topa' hehna damkiklo ding hi. Hong pai lai ding hunte-ah note in siangtakin na telzaw semsem ding uh hi
Topa in, “Keimah in sawlkhialo napi-in tua kamsangte kuankhia teitei uh hi. Thu bangmah ka genlohpi, kei' min paulamin thu a gen mawkmawk uh hi

Ahih hangin amaute in keima lungsim tawng hong thei uh hi leh keima thugente ka mite tungah taangko ding uh a, a nuntakna uh a hoihlote panin kikhelsakin, a gamtat hoihlote uh panin zong kikhelsak khinzo ding uh hi
“Kei pen mun khat bekah a om Pasian ka hi hiam? Mun khempeuhah a om Pasian hilo ka hi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi
Mi khat peuhpeuh kei' muhloh dingin busim thei ding ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi. Leitung, vantung, mun khempeuhah ka om lamtak theilo na hi uh hiam, Topa in kong ci hi
Ka min tawh zuau phuakin, ‘Mang man zo ing, mang man zo ing,’ ci-in a gen kamsang zuau theite' thuhilhnate zong ka za khinzo hi
Zuauthu tawh thu hilh a, a phuahtawm uh thu a hilh kamsangte' lungsim sungah zuauthu bang tanvei tenglai ding ahi hiam
A pute a pate un kei' min hong mangngilhin Baal a biak uh bangin a mangmat uh a gen kawikawina uh tawh ka mite in ka min hong mangngilh ding uh hi, ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi
Kamsangpa in mang a mat leh a mang bek mah gen hen la, ahih hangin ka thugenna a za mipa in ka thugente mah mantakin gen ta hen. Buhtu leh buhtang bangci kibat theih ding ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi
Ka kammal pen mei tawh ahi a, suangtum a satnenzo sek tawh ahi zongin kibang hilo ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin en un, Topa in kong genin-ah, kamsangte in amau khatlekhat tung panin a theih uh thute kei' thugen bangin a genkhiatna uh ka deih kei hi
En un, Topa in kong genin-ah, amau' ngaihsuttawm thu gen napi-in, ‘ Topa in ci hi,’ a ci khem kamsangte' langkhatah kei ka pang hi

En un, Topa in kong genin-ah, ka sawllohpi zuau mang manin tua thu hilh a, a zuauthu uh leh a kiphatsakna uh tawh ka mite lam a khialhpih mite' langkhatah kei ka pang hi. Ka mite-a' dingin amaute a kiman'na uh themkha beek omlo hi, Topa in kong ci hi

“Jeremiah aw, ka mite khat peuhpeuh in ahi a, kamsang khat ahih kei leh siampi khat peuhpeuh in ahi zongin, ‘ Topa' thugen bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot leh nangmah in, ‘ Topa' thugen nangmah na hi a, nang pen vangik khat na hi hi. Topa in nang, kong paaikhia ding hi, hong ci hi,’ ci-in gen in
Kamsang khat, ahih kei leh siampi khat, ahih kei leh ka mite khat peuhpeuh in, ‘ Topa' thugen pen vangik khat ahi hi,’ a cih leh tua mipa leh a innkuanpihte khempeuh gim ka pia ding hi
Mi khempeuh in a lawmte kiangah ahi a, a sanggamte kiangah ahi zongin, ‘ Topa in bangin hong dawng hiam? Topa in bang hong gen hiam?’ ci-in na kidongzaw ding uh hi

‘ Topa' thugen pen vangik khat ahi hi,’ ci-in na gen nawn kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note' thugente, note' vangik ahi zaw hi. Note in eite' Pasian ahi a nungta Pasian, Vanglian Topa' thugennate na lumletgawp uh hi
Kamsangpa kiangah, ‘ Topa in bangin hong dawng hiam? Topa in bang hong gen hiam?’ ci-in dongzaw un
Ahih hangin note in, ‘ Topa' thugen pen vangik ahi hi,’ na cih peuhmah uh leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in na cihloh dingun kong hilh pen ci teitei na hih manun
keimah in note leh na pu na pate uh ka piaksa khuapi ka domto ding a, ka omna panin ka lawnkhia taktak ding hi
A tawntungin simmawhna leh maizumna kong thuaksak ding a, cikmah hunin na mangngilh ngei nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
